title: India’s CG Semi Starts Production With 200 Million Chips
description: India’s CG Power & Industrial Solutions Ltd.’s new semiconductor unit has started production with an annual capacity of 200 million chips, Prime Minister Narendra Modi said Saturday, marking a fresh milestone in the country’s goal to build a domestic chip industry and gain a foothold in the global supply chain.

title: Micron Breaks Ground on $9 Billion Plant Expansion in Japan
description: Micron Technology Inc. on Saturday broke ground on the expansion of its factory in western Japan, a ¥1.5 trillion ($9.3 billion) undertaking to produce advanced memory chips.

title: China Envisions AI, Karaoke and Coffee at Cinemas
description: AI agents, karaoke and coffee shops may appear at Chinese cinemas under new guidelines that encourage theaters to expand beyond traditional film screenings.
